title: The Village Square
lines: The village square, once the heart of this community, is now a nightmare labyrinth of rusted barricades and abandoned vehicles that look like the charred carcasses of prehistoric insects.

The air is thick with a cloying fog that tastes of copper and old wet earth. You can hear the wet, rhythmic groans of the grey-skinned inhabitants echoing off the crumbling brickwork, a profane choir that sounds like nothing human.
To the north, the neon sign of the general store flickers with a sickly, violet light. To the south, the gaping maw of a tunnel leads into the lightless depths of the sewers.

options.desc: 1. Seek refuge in the flickering light of the general store
2. Descend into the lightless maw of the sewers
3. Attempt to reach the huddle of survivors in the shadows
4. Hike toward the unnatural lights of the rugby pitch
